sentence: 花的子房发育后会变成果实。
pinyin: Huā de zǐfáng fāyù hòu huì biànchéng guǒshí.
english: The ovary of a flower develops into a fruit.

sentence: 这个词指称的范围比较广，用法灵活。
pinyin: Zhège cí zhǐchēng de fànwéi bǐjiào guǎng, yòngfǎ línghuó.
english: The reference range of this word is quite broad and its usage is flexible.

sentence: 那个时代的国运与每个普通人都息息相关。
pinyin: Nàge shídài de guóyùn yǔ měi gè pǔtōng rén dōu xīxī xiāngguān.
english: In that era, the fate of the nation was closely tied to every ordinary person.

meaning: to reply (by letter, email etc); reply; answer
sentence: 我发了邮件，等了两天才收到他的回覆。
pinyin: Wǒ fā le yóujiàn, děng le liǎng tiān cái shōudào tā de huífù.
english: I sent an email and waited two days before receiving his reply.

sentence: 她在游泳世锦赛上夺得了金牌。
pinyin: Tā zài yóuyǒng shì jǐn sài shàng duódé le jīnpái.
english: She won a gold medal at the World Swimming Championships.
